about.body:
## July at Café Mars

###### Four new dishes have hit the menu this month: Sungold tomato cannoli, a tamale made with polenta and plum agridolce, our version of the Italian-American classic "peas & eggs," and gelato al puffo (Smurf ice cream!). Come try them soon and keep an eye out for even more new dishes throughout the summer!

###### For more detailed updates, follow us [on IG: **@cafemarsbk**](https://www.instagram.com/cafemarsbk/?hl=en "@cafemarsbk") or join our mailing list.

###### [Reservations now available on **OpenTable**](https://www.opentable.com/booking/experiences-availability?rid=1278811\&restref=1278811\&experienceId=598476\&utm_source=external\&utm_medium=referral\&utm_campaign=shared\&covers=2\&dateTime=2025-12-17T18:00:00 "OpenTable")!
